## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new employees to GrowthX, covering day one tasks and first week expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New hires: Valentina (Colombia), Estevão (Brazil, in SF), Bailey (Vermont, US)](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [Day 1 focus: Account setup, manager meetings, onboarding buddy intros](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - Week 1: Read company docs, attend bootcamps, set up shared <team@growthxlabs.com> email
  - [Key policies: Unlimited PTO, 4hr Pacific Time overlap, daily Geekbot updates](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

## Topics

### New Employee Introductions

  - [Valentina: From Colombia, lives with parents, enjoys gym and training](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Estevão: Brazilian software engineer, currently in San Francisco for onboarding, likes studying and traveling](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Bailey: From NYC, living in Vermont, joining as technical managing editor, enjoys outdoor activities with family](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

### Onboarding Resources and Tools

  - [Notion: Primary knowledge management platform](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [Handbook \> Onboarding Resources \> Company-wide Onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Linear: Project management tool for tracking onboarding tasks](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [Tasks categorized by day/week, updateable status](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Slack: Communication platform, includes IT & Tools channel for tech support](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [1Password: Required for accessing shared team email](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Geekbot: Integrated with Slack for daily updates](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

### Company Policies and Expectations

  - [Unlimited PTO: Block calendar time, add team, 1-2 weeks notice](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [4-hour minimum overlap with Pacific Time for remote workers](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Employee referral program: Up to $10K for engineering, $5K for non-engineering roles](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Biweekly all-hands meetings: New hires to introduce themselves](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Shared Email Setup

  - <team@growthxlabs.com>: Used for tool access and client communications
  - [Setup process involves 1Password and Google Authenticator](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete day 1 tasks: Account setups, manager meetings, onboarding buddy intros](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Watch onboarding bootcamp recordings before live sessions](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Attend all-hands meeting today, prepare brief self-introduction](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - Set up shared <team@growthxlabs.com> email access
  - [Begin week 1 tasks: Reading company documents, attending bootcamps](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Reach out to Alice on Slack for any issues or questions](https://fathom.video/share/ZDGWzuvmnMjGvskT8CpXYpEshguSqNon?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
